---
title: "Finalizing Vizs"
format:
  html:
    fig-align: center
---
# Libraries
```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(dplyr)
library(ggimage)
library(patchwork)
library(glue)
library(showtext)
library(ggtext)
library(ggpath)


#......................import Google fonts.......................
# `name` is the name of the font as it appears in Google Fonts
# `family` is the user-specified id that you'll use to apply a font in your ggplot

font.add.google(name = "Sarala", family = "sarala")


font.add.google(name = "Noto Sans", family = "noto-sans")

font.add.google(name = "Red Hat Mono", family = "red")

#....................import Font Awesome fonts...................
font_add(family = "fa-brands",
         regular = here::here("fonts","Font Awesome 7 Brands-Regular-400.otf"))
```

# Import Data
```{r, warning=FALSE,message=FALSE}
hero_kd_summary <- read.csv(here('data','hero_kd_summary.csv'))
hero_polar <- read.csv(here('data','hero_polar.csv'))
role_stats <- read.csv(here('data','role_stats.csv'))
```

# UPDATED K/D Percent Ratio
```{r, warning=FALSE}
#| fig-width: 12
#| fig-height: 10
#| out-width: "100%"


showtext.auto(enable = TRUE)

#..........................create title..........................
title <- glue::glue("<span style='color:#99381E;'>Kill</span>
                    <span style='color:#000000;'>vs</span>
                    <span style='color:#4E5472;'>Death</span>
                    <span style='color:#000000;'>Hero Comparison</span>")

#.........................create caption.........................

github_icon <- "\uf09b"
github_username <- "marietolteca00"

caption <- glue::glue(
  "Data Source: ©2026 MARVEL <br>
  <span style='font-family:fa-brands;'>{github_icon}</span>
  {github_username}"
)



hero_polar <- hero_kd_summary %>%
  mutate(hero_name = str_to_title(hero_name)) %>% 
  mutate(hero_name = reorder(hero_name, -avg_kills)) %>%
  select(hero_name, avg_kills, avg_deaths, role, image_url) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(avg_kills, avg_deaths),
               names_to = "stat",
               values_to = "value") %>%
  mutate(stat_label = ifelse(stat == "avg_kills", "Kills", "Deaths")) %>%
  mutate(hero_name = reorder(hero_name, -value[stat == "avg_kills"][match(hero_name, hero_name[stat == "avg_kills"])])) %>%
  group_by(hero_name) %>%
  mutate(
    pct = value / sum(value),
    y_pos = cumsum(pct) - 0.5 * pct
  )

# Plot 
kd_plot <- hero_polar %>%
  ggplot() +
  geom_from_path(
    data = hero_polar %>% distinct(hero_name, .keep_all = TRUE),
    aes(x = 0, y = 0, path = image_url),
    width = 0.50) +
  geom_col(aes(x = 5, y = pct, fill = stat_label), width = 2, alpha = 0.8) +
  
  # Percentage Number
  geom_text(
  data = . %>% filter(value > 0),
  aes(
    x = 5.1,
    y = y_pos,
    label = paste0(round(pct * 100, 1), "%")),
  size = 3.3,
  fontface = "bold",
  color = "#0A0A0A"
) +
  
  facet_wrap(~role + hero_name, ncol = 5) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Kills" = "#99381E", "Deaths" = "#4E5472")) +
  coord_polar("y") +
  xlim(0, 6) +
  labs(fill = "",
       title = title,
       #subtitle = "Kill to Death Comparison",
       caption = caption) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "lightgrey", color = "aliceblue", linewidth = 3),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "azure2"),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", margin = margin(b = 5)),
    legend.position = "none",
    #legend.text = element_text(size = 15),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 0.5, r = 0.5, b = 0.5, l = 0.5, unit = "cm"),
    panel.spacing = unit(1.5, "lines"),
    plot.title = ggtext::element_markdown(
      family = "noto-sans", face = "bold", size = 20,
      hjust = 0.5, color = "#ACAB97", margin = margin(b = 10)),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, margin = margin(b = 20)),
    plot.caption = ggtext::element_markdown(
      face = "italic", size = 10, margin = margin(t = 15), lineheight = 1.5)
  )

kd_plot
showtext.auto(enable = FALSE)

```
# Save Image
```{r}

#..............enable {showtext} for newly opened GD.............
showtext_auto(enable = TRUE)

#...................set resolution to match GD...................
showtext_opts(dpi = 300)

#..............write plot to file (aka save as png)..............
ggsave(
  filename = here::here("images", "kd_plot.pdf"),
  plot = kd_plot,
  device = "pdf",
  width = 12, 
  height = 10,
  unit = "in",
  dpi = 500
)

#...............turn off {showtext} text rendering...............
showtext_auto(enable = FALSE)
```



# Role Stats Finalizing
```{r}
role_stats <- role_stats %>%
  left_join(
    hero_polar %>% distinct(role, image_url),
    by = "role"
  )


# Bar Chart - Win Rate by Roles
ggplot(role_stats, aes(x = role, y = win_rate)) +
  geom_col(fill = "steelblue") +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(round(win_rate*100, 1), "%")), vjust = -0.5) +
  labs(x = "Role", y = "Win Rate", title = "Win Rate by Role")+
  geom_image(aes(image =))

```
# Updated
```{r}

ggplot(role_stats, aes(x = win_rate, y = 1, size = games, fill = role)) +
  geom_point(shape = 21, alpha = 0.7) +
  scale_size_continuous(range = c(10, 40)) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent, limits = c(0, 1)) +
  labs(
    title = "Win Rate by Role",
    subtitle = "Bubble size represents games played",
    x = "Win Rate",
    y = "",
    fill = "Role",
    size = "Games Played"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10)
  ) +
  guides(
    fill = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 8)),  # bigger role circles
    size = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = c(2, 4, 6)))  # smaller games circles
  )
```
# Data Wrangle
```{r}
# max_games <- max(role_stats$games)
# radius_scale <- 0.06  # tweak this to change overall circle sizes
# 
# role_stats4 <- role_stats %>%
#   group_by(role) %>%
#   mutate(
#     hero_index = row_number(),
#     n_heroes = n(),
#     r = games / max_games * radius_scale,
#     angle = 2 * pi * (hero_index - 1) / n_heroes,
#     # position images at ~60% of radius so they stay inside the circle
#     image_x = win_rate + (r * 0.6) * cos(angle),
#     image_y = 1 + (r * 0.6) * sin(angle)
#   ) %>%
#   ungroup()


size_range <- c(20, 60)
max_games <- max(role_stats4$games)

# key: get actual plot dimensions to correct aspect ratio
x_range <- 1       # 0 to 1 (0% to 100%)
y_range <- 0.4     # approximate y range visible in plot

role_stats4 <- role_stats4 %>%
  group_by(role) %>%
  mutate(
    pt_size = size_range[1] + (games / max_games) * (size_range[2] - size_range[1]),
    r = pt_size * 0.0008,
    angle = 2 * pi * (hero_index - 1) / n_heroes,
    image_x = win_rate + r * cos(angle),
    image_y = 1 + (r * (x_range / y_range) * 0.15) * sin(angle)  
  ) %>%
  ungroup()
```


# Final Viz before Affinity Edits
```{r,warning=FALSE}
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 8
#| out-width: "100%"


showtext.auto(enable = TRUE)

#..........................create title..........................
title <- glue::glue("<span style='color:#000000;'>Win</span>
                    <span style='color:#000000;'>Rate</span>
                    <span style='color:#ACAB97;'>by</span>
                    <span style='color:#000000;'>Role</span>")

#.........................create caption.........................

github_icon <- "\uf09b"
github_username <- "marietolteca00"

caption <- glue::glue(
  "Data Source: ©2026 MARVEL <br>
  <span style='font-family:fa-brands;'>{github_icon}</span>
  {github_username}"
)

win_rate <- ggplot(role_stats4 %>% distinct(role, win_rate, games), aes(x = win_rate, y = 1)) +
  
  # black to dark red Marvel gradient
  annotation_custom(
    grid::rasterGrob(
      matrix(c("#0a0a0a", "#1a0a0a", "#2d0a0a", "#8b0000"), nrow = 1),
      width = unit(1, "npc"), height = unit(1, "npc"),
      interpolate = TRUE
    ),
    xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf
  ) +
  
  geom_point(aes(size = games, fill = role), shape = 21, alpha = 0.8) +
  
  geom_image(
    data = role_stats4,
    aes(x = image_x, y = image_y, image = image_url),
    size = 0.080
  ) +
  
  # role label below each bubble
  geom_text(
    data = role_stats4 %>% distinct(role, win_rate, games),
    aes(x = win_rate, y = 0.91, label = role, color = role),
    fontface = "bold", size = 4.5
  ) +
  
  scale_size_continuous(range = size_range) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Duelist"    = "#E69F00",   # orange
    "Strategist" = "#56B4E9",   # sky blue
    "Vanguard"   = "#D55E00"    # vermillion
  )) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "Duelist"    = "#E69F00",
    "Strategist" = "#56B4E9",
    "Vanguard"   = "#D55E00"
  ))+
  
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent, limits = c(0, 1)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0.88, 1.15)) +

  
  labs(
    title = title,
    subtitle = "Bubble size represents games played",
    x = "Win Rate",
    y = "",
    caption = caption,
    size = "Games Played"
  ) +
  
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "#343A51", color = "#8b0000", linewidth = 4),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA),
    
    # subtle red-tinted gridlines
    panel.grid.major.x = element_line(color = "#3d0000", linewidth = 0.4, linetype = "dashed"),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_line(color = "#1f0000", linewidth = 0.2, linetype = "dotted"),
    
    # x-axis in silver/white
    axis.text.x  = element_text(size = 10, color = "#c0c0c0"),
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(color = "#c0c0c0"),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12, color = "#ffffff", face = "bold", margin = margin(t = 8)),
    
    axis.text.y  = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    
    # legend in silver/white
    legend.title    = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", color = "#ffffff"),
    legend.text     = element_text(size = 12, color = "#ffffff"),
    legend.position = "top",
    
    plot.title = ggtext::element_markdown(
      family = "noto-sans", face = "bold", size = 30,
      hjust = 0.5, color = "#ffffff", margin = margin(b = 5, t=15)),
    plot.subtitle = ggtext::element_markdown(
      size = 18, hjust = 0.5, color = "#c0c0c0",
      family = "bold.italic",
      margin = margin(b = 10)),
    plot.caption = ggtext::element_markdown(
      face = "italic", size = 10, color = "#c0c0c0",
      margin = margin(t = 5), lineheight = 1.5, hjust = 0.98)
  ) +
  
  guides(
    fill  = "none",
    color = "none",
    size  = guide_legend(override.aes = list(
      size = c(2, 4, 6),
      color = "white"  # legend circle outlines in white
    ))
  )

win_rate
showtext.auto(enable = FALSE)

```


# Save Image
```{r}

#..............enable {showtext} for newly opened GD.............
showtext_auto(enable = TRUE)

#...................set resolution to match GD...................
showtext_opts(dpi = 300)

#..............write plot to file (aka save as png)..............
ggsave(
  filename = here::here("images", "win_rate.pdf"),
  plot = win_rate,
  device = "pdf",
  width = 10, 
  height = 8,
  unit = "in",
  dpi = 500
)

#...............turn off {showtext} text rendering...............
showtext_auto(enable = FALSE)
```





```{r, warning=FALSE}

# ggplot(role_stats4 %>% distinct(role, win_rate, games), aes(x = win_rate, y = 1)) +
# 
#   annotation_custom(
#     grid::rasterGrob(
#       matrix(c("#0a0a0a", "#1a0a0a", "#2d0a0a", "#8b0000"), nrow = 1),
#       width = unit(1, "npc"), height = unit(1, "npc"),
#       interpolate = TRUE
#     ),
#     xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf
#   ) +
# 
#   geom_point(aes(size = games, fill = role), shape = 21, alpha = 0.8) +
# 
#   geom_image(
#     data = role_stats4,
#     aes(x = image_x, y = image_y, image = image_url),
#     size = 0.090
#   ) +
# 
#   # role labels just below each bubble — y = 0.91 brings them closer
#   geom_text(
#     data = role_stats4 %>% distinct(role, win_rate, games),
#     aes(x = win_rate, y = 0.91, label = role, color = role),
#     fontface = "bold", size = 4.5
#   ) +
# 
#   scale_size_continuous(range = size_range) +
#   scale_fill_manual(values = c(
#     "Duelist"    = "#E69F00",
#     "Strategist" = "#56B4E9",
#     "Vanguard"   = "#D55E00"
#   )) +
#   scale_color_manual(values = c(
#     "Duelist"    = "#E69F00",
#     "Strategist" = "#56B4E9",
#     "Vanguard"   = "#D55E00"
#   )) +
# 
#   scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent, limits = c(0, 1)) +
# 
#   # tighten y limits to reduce empty space, push labels closer
#   scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0.88, 1.15)) +
# 
#   labs(
#     title = "Win Rate by Hero Role",
#     subtitle = "Bubble size represents games played",
#     x = "Win Rate",
#     y = "",
#     size = "Games Played"
#   ) +
# 
#   theme_void() +
#   theme(
#     plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "#0a0a0a", color = "#8b0000", linewidth = 4),
#     panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA),
# 
#     panel.grid.major.x = element_line(color = "#3d0000", linewidth = 0.4, linetype = "dashed"),
#     panel.grid.minor.x = element_line(color = "#1f0000", linewidth = 0.2, linetype = "dotted"),
# 
#     axis.text.x  = element_text(size = 10, color = "#c0c0c0"),
#     axis.ticks.x = element_line(color = "#c0c0c0"),
#     axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12, color = "#ffffff", face = "bold", margin = margin(t = 8)),
# 
#     axis.text.y  = element_blank(),
#     axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
#     panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
# 
#     legend.title    = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", color = "#ffffff"),
#     legend.text     = element_text(size = 12, color = "#c0c0c0"),
#     legend.position = "top",
# 
#     plot.title = ggtext::element_markdown(
#       family = "noto-sans", face = "bold", size = 22,
#       hjust = 0.5, color = "#ffffff", margin = margin(t = 15, b = 5)),
#     plot.subtitle = ggtext::element_markdown(
#       size = 11, hjust = 0.5, color = "#c0c0c0",
#       margin = margin(b = 10)),
#     plot.caption = ggtext::element_markdown(
#       face = "italic", size = 10, color = "#c0c0c0",
#       margin = margin(t = 15), lineheight = 1.5)
#   ) +
# 
#   guides(
#     fill  = "none",
#     color = "none",
#     size  = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = c(2, 4, 6), color = "white"))
#   )
```
